topic: Q13: Long-Running Agent Deadlock Recovery. Detecting and resolving deadlocks in 24hr+ agent conversations: Custom Cloud Trace spans -> Gemini-powered deadlock analysis -> Automatic context reset with memory summarization, preserving 95% conversation state.
question_text: How would you design a system to detect and recover from deadlocks in long-running 24hr+ agent conversations on GCP, ensuring minimal conversation state loss?
hook_text: Long-running AI agent conversations can hit deadlocks. Here's how to detect and automatically recover, preserving 95% of context.
cta_text: Master agent resilience. Follow for more advanced AI architecture tips!

answer_sections.title: Trace-Based Deadlock Detection
answer_sections.text:
Implement custom Cloud Trace spans. Monitor agent states,
message flow, and extended idle times. Identify circular dependencies.
Deadlocks are then automatically flagged.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Custom Cloud Trace spans monitor agent states, message flow, and extended idle times to flag deadlocks.

answer_sections.title: AI-Powered Deadlock Analysis
answer_sections.text:
Feed trace data to Gemini 3.1 Pro. Analyze patterns
indicating deadlocks. Automate context reset strategies.
Summarize memory, preserving 95% conversation state.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Gemini 3.1 Pro analyzes trace data for deadlocks, automating context reset and memory summarization.

answer_sections.title: Automated Context Reset
answer_sections.text:
Upon deadlock detection, trigger automatic context reset.
Gemini 3.1 Pro summarizes conversation memory. This preserves
95% of critical dialogue state. Re-engages agent effectively.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Triggering automatic context reset involves Gemini 3.1 Pro summarizing memory, preserving 95% of conversation state.

diagrams.title: State Preservation
diagrams.dsl: [Context Reset Strategy] -> (Memory Summarization by Gemini 3.1 Pro) -> (95% State Preserved)
